texto: Any attempt to reduce the Bible to a guidebook for how to live is not only wrong, it's also idolatrous. It replaces Christ at the center with something else, with moralism. The point of the Word, the goal of Christianity, is not to teach you how to be a good person, or a good man. The goal is repentance and forgiveness, given freely to sinners, because of the substitutionary death of the God-man, Jesus.
explicacao: Citação de Jeffrey Hemmer sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Any attempt to reduce the Bible to a guidebook for how to live is not only wrong, it's also idola…” articula educacao, bible, gospel em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como luto e gospel.
